laptop.description: Portable laptop for architecture, audits, documentation, sync, and light factor smoke checks.

highspec_desktop.description: Higher-spec desktop for data generation, large Tushare factor batches, and heavier validation.

office_desktop.description: Office desktop for additional factor batches, validation reruns, and data-quality checks.

architecture_ops.description: Project architecture, audits, CI, tests, documentation, GitHub sync, and merge work.

project_sync.description: Repository synchronization, branch cleanup, and safe mainline integration.

data_pipeline.description: Tushare downloads, local raw/processed data generation, and data-quality checks.

factor_mining_core.description: Reusable factor definitions, IC/RankIC logic, quantile returns, and research framework code.

factor_smoke.description: Small-sample factor smoke tests and fast local replication checks.

factor_batch.description: Large factor experiment batches. Multiple desktops should use separate topic/date branches. CN stock factor batches must first run scripts/run_factor_mining_startup_gate.py and scripts/run_cn_stock_data_manifest.py. The startup gate must confirm the repeatable audit-driven next-run protocol before mining.

factor_validation.description: Candidate factor validation, walk-forward reruns, cost checks, market-regime coverage checks, robustness reviews, and desktop residual-regime validation via scripts/run_checks.py --profile desktop-validation --execute. CN stock validation reruns must first confirm the startup gate and CN stock data manifest.

factor_review.description: Review candidate reports and promote only robust findings into integration work.

factor_integration.description: Integrate validated factor logic into the formal pipeline before mainline merge.

branch_policy.naming_rule: Name branches by work content, not by machine. Use the machine only as startup context.
branch_policy.temporary_branch_cleanup: Delete task branches after their work is merged and verified.
branch_policy.main_rule: Do not run exploratory factor development directly on main.
branch_policy.conversation_start_rule: Start new Codex conversations from main, pull latest main, then create or switch to a task branch before non-trivial work.

ask_before_push_when: current branch is main and task is not project_sync
token, credential, broker, account, or order-risk files are present

data_policy.sync_large_data_with: Local copy, NAS, external drive, or future DVC/object storage.

safety: TUSHARE_TOKEN must stay in the local environment and must not be written to repository files.
